summary: Provision AWS AppSync for a new GraphQL API. Creating the API container is an engineer-gated form; the schema, data sources, and resolvers that give it behavior are always finished by the engineer afterward.

operations.title: Create a new GraphQL API
operations.summary: Request a new AppSync GraphQL API. An engineer finalizes and reviews the Terraform before it's applied.
operations.description: Specify a new aws_appsync_graphql_api: its name and authentication mode. The GraphQL schema (SDL), data sources, and resolvers are always finished by the engineer — this form provisions the empty API container. Submitting routes it to an engineer with a draft Terraform block to review and finish.

params.name: api_name
params.label: API name
params.help: The API's name in the AppSync console.

params.name: authentication_type
params.label: Authentication mode
params.help: API_KEY is the simplest for prototyping (a shareable key, expires by default); AWS_IAM authenticates callers with their AWS credentials. The other three need extra required configuration an engineer completes during review.

params.name: visibility
params.label: Visibility
params.help: PRIVATE restricts the API to requests that originate inside the VPC.

params.name: xray_enabled
params.label: AWS X-Ray tracing
params.help: Traces requests through resolvers and data sources for debugging and latency analysis.

params.name: resource_name
params.label: API name tag
params.help: Shown as the name everywhere — consoles, tickets, this portal.

params.name: description_tag
params.label: What this API is for
params.help: One line an operator can act on at 3 AM.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: Who to call about this API.

decisions: The GraphQL schema (SDL), data sources, resolvers, and functions are engineer follow-ups — this form provisions the empty API container

Choosing AMAZON_COGNITO_USER_POOLS, OPENID_CONNECT, or AWS_LAMBDA authentication requires additional required configuration (user_pool_config / openid_connect_config / lambda_authorizer_config) that an engineer completes during review
Additional authentication providers (additional_authentication_provider) beyond the primary mode are an engineer decision
